name: Morning Briefing

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: "0 23 * * *" # 매일 23:00 UTC = KST 08:00
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  send-briefing:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "22"
          cache: npm

      - run: npm ci

      - name: Run morning briefing
        env:
          NOTION_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.NOTION_API_KEY }}
          NOTION_INTERESTS_DB_ID: ${{ secrets.NOTION_INTERESTS_DB_ID }}
          NOTION_SMALLSTEPS_DB_ID: ${{ secrets.NOTION_SMALLSTEPS_DB_ID }}
          NOTION_GOALS_DB_ID: ${{ secrets.NOTION_GOALS_DB_ID }}
          GEMINI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.GEMINI_API_KEY }}
          GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_JSON: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_JSON }}
          GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN }}
          RECIPIENT_EMAIL: ${{ secrets.RECIPIENT_EMAIL }}
        run: npm run morning
